eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 02:08 PM ON APR 3, 2026 Effective until 02:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
TORNADO WATCH in effect until 10pm for Worth County. 
TORNADO WARNING in effect for NW Nodaway County until 4:15pm. Storms are moving NW at 35mph. 
Take precautions and stay alert to rapidly changing conditions.
